ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock prices */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price (for splits and dividends) */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily price ID */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute change in stock price */,
  "change_over_time" REAL /* Change over time metric */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES daily_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol of the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Publish date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in value since last trading day */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in value */,
  "year_high" REAL /* Year-to-date high value of the index */,
  "year_low" REAL /* Year-to-date low value of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date for the trend value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the trend on that date */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction fee */,
  "fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol in the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screeners" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the screener */,
  "screener_name" TEXT /* Name of the screener */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the screener (e.g., market cap, sector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screeners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_recommenders" (
  "recommender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (e.g., confidence level) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_recommenders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_recommenders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketcalendar" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event entry */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., holiday, earnings report) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
